title: Tokenized Leverage on Hyperliquid | Bounce.Tech
summary_title: Tokenized leverage tokens: composability, ecosystem plays, and why Bounce beats perps
summary_description: Louis from Bounce Tech explains leverage token mechanics, rebalancing, and how tokenization unlocks DeFi composability on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Louis's background: TLX protocol, leverage tokens, five years in crypto
Why they couldn't build on Hyperliquid until precompiles launched
Bounce Tech explained: tokenizes Hyperliquid perps as ERC20, no liquidation
Hyperliquid precompiles: query bridge between Hyper EVM and Hypercore
May Hype rally: 5x perp +400%, Hype 5L +650% due to up-levering
Composability unlocks ecosystem: Zcash 3x long protected holders vs liquidation
Revenue driven by volume and redemption fees, not TVL
Roadmap: expanding to multi-strategy tokenized vaults and agentic management

pull_quote: The largest order book on chain just became composable and liquidity is absolutely key for efficient leverage tokens
